'''Cloak Force''' was a a group of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[Raid on Nomad City|stolen]] [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]] that served the [[Galactic Empire]].<ref name="heir" /> In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]],<ref name="atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the unit was smuggled into the [[Sluis system]] in the [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaked]] cargo hold of the ''[[Nartissteu]]'', where it was able to capture several [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ships briefly by using the mole miners to drill through their hulls and deposit boarding parties of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]] on the vessels.<ref name="heir" />

Eight of the mole miners were destroyed by Republic and [[Sluis Van Shipyards|Sluissi]] forces and the other forty-three were ruined or left to be reclaimed by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] after he gave his override codes at the [[Battle of Sluis Van]] and sent them drilling entirely through the ships to which they were attached. Some of the [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]] were also destroyed, but most retreated with their commander—[[Cloak Leader]]—back to the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']].<ref name="heir" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}}
